creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #6)

Hmm. https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-main-amd64-test/24159/consoleText
reports:

sys/net/if_lagg_test:status_stress  ->  skipped: Skipping this test because it panics the machine fairly often  [0.022s]

So, apparently, not arm64 (or armv7) specific at all. I just happen to
be using an aarch64 context.

Also, apparently, the presence of one or more issues has been known for
some time. I've no clue if the use-after-free likely status as an issue
was known vs. not.
